components.title: What is your request related to?

components.name: aNNjpD
components.content:
Use this form to get in touch about any issues related to radon.

This could be

  • queries about radon
  • issues with an order
  • getting a quote

Before you continue

You can find guidance and information about radon in your home or workplace on our website.

pages.title: Contact the Personal Dosimetry Service team

components.name: aNNjpD
components.content:
Use this form to reach out to us about enquiries related to the Personal Dosimetry Service (PDS).

This could be

  • starting to use the service
  • getting a copy of your record
  • getting a quote
  • using the UKHSA Online Dosimetry Portal - CLARA
  • any other enquiries

Before you continue

You can find information about our dose measurements, or assessment services.

You can also for queries about CLARA send an email to clarasupport@ukhsa.gov.uk.
